outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to massive positive GEX (1.17B) in 0DTE; price likely to pin near Max Pain levels with limited directional movement
outlook.summary: Market in consolidation phase with dealers long gamma suppressing short-term volatility. Spot hovering directly above Weekly Max Pain at 24400, creating magnetic pinning effect. Strong structural support at 24000 where 0DTE+Monthly PUT confluence aligns with Gamma Flip. Bearish skew in Weekly/Monthly expiries suggests underlying caution, but positive total GEX dominates near-term price action. Watch for breakout above 24700 or test of 24000 support zone.

levels.motivazione: Major structural support: PUT OI 354 (0DTE) + 1549 (Monthly). Gamma Flip at 23980.58 amplifies importance. Dealers defend aggressively.
Weekly Max Pain exactly at spot (0.05% distance). Highest CALL OI 250 in Weekly. Primary pinning target for expiry.
Critical gamma pivot where cumulative GEX changes sign. Confluence with 24000 support creates structural inflection point.
Monthly Max Pain with significant CALL OI: 209 (0DTE) + 308 (Monthly). Below spot support zone attracting price.
Dominant 0DTE CALL OI 259 with massive VOL 1368. Primary resistance capping upside. Dealers sell here.
0DTE Max Pain with PUT OI 301. Secondary magnetic zone if spot breaks below 24300 support.
Monthly CALL WALL with massive OI 1125. Major structural resistance capping upside in longer timeframe.
